evidence_quotes.quote: its realy unfair to make games dissapear that i paid good money for.
let us play solo the games we love and wil want to play forever.
Gaming is a escape from the real world and al the trouble in it, please let us escape and play al the games we want.

paragraphs.text: I would hate for games to dissapear and stop excisting for ever, the games i love to play because my husband introduced me to the gaming genre and i m a proud member for 6 years its one of my favorite hobby's. I support fully the stop killing games petition, its realy unfair to make games dissapear that i paid good money for. And i get that you cant put the servers up for years, But the point is give it to the fans let us play solo the games we love and wil want to play forever. i said to my husband: playing a game is like living another life, and i love to live every life with him. Gaming is a escape from the real world and al the trouble in it, please let us escape and play al the games we want. I could have put al the points from the movement stop killing games and wrighting it here but i choose to put something personel here what it means to me and even what it means to us al. i take my husband and i for example, but im sure there are many more gamers thinking the same thing,
